name: settings-screen
title: Settings Screen
description: A model-driven settings UI with inset-grouped cards and five row types — toggle, disclosure, value, button, slider — each with a tinted SF Symbol tile. Composite: built on vertical-list.
usage:
let screen = SettingsScreen(sections: [
    .init(header: "General", rows: [
        .toggle(icon: UIImage(systemName: "moon.fill"), iconTint: .systemIndigo,
                title: "Dark Mode", isOn: true) { on in print(on) },
        .disclosure(icon: UIImage(systemName: "bell.fill"), iconTint: .systemRed,
                    title: "Notifications") { print("open") },
    ]),
])
view.addSubview(screen)  // pin to edges
